title: Marine Cargo Claims Handler
description:
about the company

Our client, leading global insurance provider with a focus on specialty lines across various sectors. They offer a dynamic and professional environment, fostering a culture of high performance, integrity and client-centric service in a multinational setting.

about the job

You will proactively manage a specialized book of Marine claims from investigation through to final settlement, ensuring compliance and superior service delivery.

  • Proactively investigate facts and accurately interpret policy coverage and response.

  • Manage and adjust all incoming specialty line Marine claims, delegating administrative tasks when appropriate.

  • Accurately set and regularly review reserves for indemnity and defense costs in line with the company’s philosophy.

  • Strategically settle claims within prescribed authority limits in an expeditious and economical manner.

skills and experience required

  • The ideal candidate will possess robust technical knowledge and proven claims management capability.

  • Strong knowledge of the Asia Marine market and the ability to apply legal principles to claims management.

  • Exposure handling full product suite of Marine claims such as Cargo, Project Cargo, Hull and Liabilities Insurance

  • Excellent command of PC-based systems, including database systems and Microsoft Office applications.

  • Demonstrated ability to provide instructions to external service providers and influence co-insurers for optimum outcomes.

  • Tertiary qualifications in a related field are desirable, focusing on technical and soft skill development.


Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online.
(EA:94C3609/R132534)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
